welcome: 👋 Welcome, {name}! I can help you find and download images from Pinterest. 📝 How to use: • Send me any search query (e.g., 'cats', 'beautiful landscapes') • I'll show you {batch_size} images at a time • Use the buttons to see more or start a new search 🔍 Try it now: Send me a search term!
help: 🤖 Pinterest Image Bot Help Commands: /start - Start the bot /help - Show this help /new - Start a new search /stop - Stop current search /language - Change language How to search: Simply type what you want to find! Examples: 'sunset beach', 'cute puppies', 'modern architecture' Features: • Shows {batch_size} images per batch • Caches results for faster access • Continue or stop anytime
language_prompt: 🌐 Select your language: Choose your preferred language:
language_unsupported: ❌ Language not supported. Defaulting to English.
no_images_found: ❌ No images found Please try a different search term.
no_images_available: ❌ No images available Please try again later.
no_more_images: ✨ No more images Use /new to start another search!
session_expired: ⚠️ Session expired Please start a new search.
search_stopped: ⏹️ Search stopped Use /new to start another search!
ready_for_search: 🆕 Ready for new search Send me what you'd like to find!
error_occurred: ❌ An error occurred Please try again later.
empty_query: Please send a non-empty search query.
large_file: ⚠️ File too large, sending as document
